title.en: The DMG/directional element family — 60 GHz beamforming, scheduling, and relay elements
title.zh: DMG/定向元素家族——60 GHz 波束成形、调度与中继元素

blocks.en: At 60 GHz (the DMG/directional multi-gigabit band, and its enhanced EDMG / claused CDMG / centimetre-wave CMMG cousins) almost nothing is omnidirectional. Energy travels in narrow beams that have to be pointed, and a blocked beam means a dead link. So the Information Elements that live in this part of the standard all answer one of four questions: when do I get to transmit, where do I point my beam (and how good is it), who relays for me when the path breaks, and how healthy is the link right now. This lesson is a guided tour — name each element and its one job.
blocks.zh: 在 60 GHz（即 DMG 定向超高速频段，以及它的增强版 EDMG、CDMG 与厘米波 CMMG 兄弟）上，几乎没有什么是全向的。能量沿着必须被“瞄准”的窄波束传播，一旦波束被遮挡，链路就会中断。因此这一部分标准里的信息元素（IE）都在回答四个问题之一：我何时可以发送、我把波束指向哪里（以及它有多好）、当路径中断时谁来为我中继，以及当前链路有多健康。本课是一次导览——逐一点名每个元素及其唯一职责。

blocks.en: First, scheduling — who owns the air, and when. The Extended Schedule (9.4.2.130) and the high-throughput EDMG Extended Schedule (9.4.2.266) and channel-bonded CDMG Extended Schedule (9.4.2.220) lay out the allocation map of service periods and contention windows. Next DMG ATI (9.4.2.134) points to the next announcement interval, and the DMG TSPEC (9.4.2.132) describes the traffic a STA wants a service period to carry. DMG Wakeup Schedule (9.4.2.129) and the Awake Window (9.4.2.136) tell a power-saving STA when to be listening. Capabilities are advertised by DMG Capabilities (9.4.2.126), DMG Operation (9.4.2.127), and DMG BSS Parameter Change (9.4.2.125) for the base band; CDMG Capabilities (9.4.2.218) plus Dynamic Bandwidth Control (9.4.2.219) for the bonded variant; EDMG Capabilities (9.4.2.264) / EDMG Operation (9.4.2.265) / EDMG Group ID Set (9.4.2.268) for the enhanced PHY; and CMMG Capabilities (9.4.2.228) / CMMG Operation (9.4.2.229) / CMMG Operating Mode Notification (9.4.2.230) for centimetre-wave. The Multi-band element (9.4.2.137) advertises that a device can also operate on another band entirely.
blocks.zh: 首先是调度——谁拥有空口、何时拥有。Extended Schedule（9.4.2.130）、高吞吐的 EDMG Extended Schedule（9.4.2.266）以及信道捆绑的 CDMG Extended Schedule（9.4.2.220）排布出服务周期与竞争窗口的分配图。Next DMG ATI（9.4.2.134）指向下一个通告间隔，DMG TSPEC（9.4.2.132）则描述某站点希望某个服务周期承载的业务流。DMG Wakeup Schedule（9.4.2.129）与 Awake Window（9.4.2.136）告诉省电站点何时应当侦听。能力通过这些元素通告：基础频段用 DMG Capabilities（9.4.2.126）、DMG Operation（9.4.2.127）、DMG BSS Parameter Change（9.4.2.125）；捆绑变体用 CDMG Capabilities（9.4.2.218）加 Dynamic Bandwidth Control（9.4.2.219）；增强 PHY 用 EDMG Capabilities（9.4.2.264）/ EDMG Operation（9.4.2.265）/ EDMG Group ID Set（9.4.2.268）；厘米波用 CMMG Capabilities（9.4.2.228）/ CMMG Operation（9.4.2.229）/ CMMG Operating Mode Notification（9.4.2.230）。Multi-band 元素（9.4.2.137）则通告该设备还能在另一个完全不同的频段上工作。

blocks.en: Second, beam refinement and MIMO sounding — where do I point, and how good is the beam. DMG Beam Refinement (9.4.2.128) carries the requests/feedback that sharpen a beam during the beam-refinement protocol; Channel Measurement Feedback (9.4.2.135) and EDMG Channel Measurement Feedback (9.4.2.267) report the measured channel back to the transmitter. Antenna Sector ID Pattern (9.4.2.155) names which antenna sectors a STA used. For directional MIMO, four control elements run the exchange: MIMO Setup Control (9.4.2.272) opens it, MIMO Poll Control (9.4.2.273) solicits feedback, MIMO Feedback Control (9.4.2.274) carries it, and MIMO Selection Control (9.4.2.275) picks the configuration; Digital BF Feedback (9.4.2.283) returns digital beamforming coefficients, and Enhanced Beam Tracking (9.4.2.225) keeps a moving beam locked on.
blocks.zh: 其次是波束精化与 MIMO 探测——我把波束指向哪里，以及它有多好。DMG Beam Refinement（9.4.2.128）在波束精化协议中携带使波束更锐利的请求/反馈；Channel Measurement Feedback（9.4.2.135）与 EDMG Channel Measurement Feedback（9.4.2.267）把测得的信道回报给发送方。Antenna Sector ID Pattern（9.4.2.155）说明站点用了哪些天线扇区，Sectorized Group ID List（9.4.2.231）则按扇区将站点分组以支持扇区化操作。对于定向 MIMO，四个控制元素驱动整个交换：MIMO Setup Control（9.4.2.272）发起、MIMO Poll Control（9.4.2.273）征询反馈、MIMO Feedback Control（9.4.2.274）携带反馈、MIMO Selection Control（9.4.2.275）选定配置；Digital BF Feedback（9.4.2.283）回传数字波束成形系数，Enhanced Beam Tracking（9.4.2.225）则让移动中的波束保持锁定。

blocks.en: Third, TDD slot framing. In time-division-duplex DMG operation the air is sliced into fixed slots. TDD Slot Structure (9.4.2.280) defines the slot layout, TDD Slot Schedule (9.4.2.281) assigns those slots to STAs, TDD Route (9.4.2.282) describes the forwarding path through them, TDD Bandwidth Request (9.4.2.284) asks for more slots, and TDD Synchronization (9.4.2.285) keeps every node's slot clock aligned. EDMG Wide Bandwidth Channel Switch (9.4.2.286) moves the enhanced-PHY link to a different wide channel.
blocks.zh: 第三是 TDD 时隙成帧。在时分双工的 DMG 操作中，空口被切成固定时隙。TDD Slot Structure（9.4.2.280）定义时隙布局，TDD Slot Schedule（9.4.2.281）把这些时隙分配给各站点，TDD Route（9.4.2.282）描述穿过这些时隙的转发路径，TDD Bandwidth Request（9.4.2.284）请求更多时隙，TDD Synchronization（9.4.2.285）让每个节点的时隙时钟保持对齐。EDMG Wide Bandwidth Channel Switch（9.4.2.286）把增强 PHY 链路切换到另一个宽信道上。

blocks.en: Fourth, link and cluster reporting — how healthy is everything. DMG Link Margin (9.4.2.141) and the centimetre-wave CMMG Link Margin (9.4.2.231) report how much headroom a link has, and DMG Link Adaptation Acknowledgment (9.4.2.142) and CMMG Link Adaptation Acknowledgment (9.4.2.232) confirm a rate/MCS change. For clustering (multiple PCP/APs sharing the medium), Cluster Report (9.4.2.145), Cluster Time Offset (carried alongside), Cluster Probe (9.4.2.222), Extended Cluster Report (9.4.2.223), Cluster Switch Announcement (9.4.2.224), and Clustering Interference Assessment (9.4.2.227) coordinate and re-time the cluster, while SSW Report (9.4.2.221) and SPSH Report (9.4.2.226) summarise sector-sweep and spatial-sharing results. DMG STA Directional Transmit Activity Report (9.4.2.289) and Extended Link Measurement (9.4.2.288) round out the directional measurement picture.
blocks.zh: 第四是链路与集群报告——一切是否健康。DMG Link Margin（9.4.2.141）与厘米波 CMMG Link Margin（9.4.2.231）报告链路还有多少余量，DMG Link Adaptation Acknowledgment（9.4.2.142）与 CMMG Link Adaptation Acknowledgment（9.4.2.232）确认速率/MCS 的变更。对于集群（多个 PCP/AP 共享介质）：Cluster Report（9.4.2.145）、Cluster Probe（9.4.2.222）、Extended Cluster Report（9.4.2.223）、Cluster Switch Announcement（9.4.2.224）与 Clustering Interference Assessment（9.4.2.227）协调并重新对齐集群时序，而 SSW Report（9.4.2.221）与 SPSH Report（9.4.2.226）则汇总扇区扫描与空间共享的结果。DMG STA Directional Transmit Activity Report（9.4.2.289）与 Extended Link Measurement（9.4.2.288）补全了定向测量的全貌。

blocks.en: Finally, relay and handover — keeping the link alive when a beam is blocked. Relay Capabilities (9.4.2.146) advertises that a STA can relay, and the Relay Transfer Parameter Set (9.4.2.147) parameterises how. When the controlling PCP needs to hand off, NextPCP List (9.4.2.139) names the candidate successors and PCP Handover (9.4.2.140) executes the transfer; Session Transition (9.4.2.144) and Switching Stream (9.4.2.143) move a session/stream between bands or paths. BeamLink Maintenance (9.4.2.150) keeps an established beam link alive, MMS (multi-band; 9.4.2.151) and U-PID (9.4.2.152) tag multi-band and protocol-specific information, DMG Discovery Assistance (9.4.2.287) helps a STA find directional neighbours, and the DMG OCB element (9.4.2.310) supports operation outside the context of a BSS.
blocks.zh: 最后是中继与切换——当波束被遮挡时让链路不中断。Relay Capabilities（9.4.2.146）通告某站点可作中继，Relay Transfer Parameter Set（9.4.2.147）则参数化中继方式。当控制方 PCP 需要移交时，NextPCP List（9.4.2.139）列出候选继任者，PCP Handover（9.4.2.140）执行移交；Session Transition（9.4.2.144）与 Switching Stream（9.4.2.143）在频段或路径之间迁移会话/数据流。BeamLink Maintenance（9.4.2.150）维持已建立的波束链路，MMS（多频段；9.4.2.151）与 U-PID（9.4.2.152）标记多频段与协议特定信息，DMG Discovery Assistance（9.4.2.287）帮助站点发现定向邻居，而 DMG OCB 元素（9.4.2.310）支持在 BSS 上下文之外的操作。

blocks.en: A reading aid: every name with a band prefix tells you the PHY it serves. DMG = the original 60 GHz multi-gigabit; CDMG = channel-bonded DMG; EDMG = enhanced (802.11ay) DMG with wider channels and MIMO; CMMG = centimetre-wave multi-gigabit. So 'EDMG Extended Schedule' is just the Extended Schedule, reshaped for the enhanced PHY.
blocks.zh: 一个阅读小窍门：每个带频段前缀的名字都在告诉你它服务于哪种 PHY。DMG = 最初的 60 GHz 超高速；CDMG = 信道捆绑的 DMG；EDMG = 增强型（802.11ay）DMG，信道更宽并支持 MIMO；CMMG = 厘米波超高速。所以“EDMG Extended Schedule”不过是为增强 PHY 重新塑形的 Extended Schedule 而已。

summary.en: Where these IDs live in Table 9-130 — low-index vs Element ID Extension
summary.zh: 这些 ID 在 Table 9-130 中的位置——低位索引 vs Element ID Extension

blocks.en: Table 9-130 (Element IDs) assigns these elements across two regimes. The older DMG-era elements take ordinary single-octet Element IDs: e.g. DMG Wakeup Schedule (9.4.2.129) = 143, Extended Schedule (9.4.2.130) = 144, DMG Capabilities (9.4.2.126) = 148, DMG Operation (9.4.2.127) = 151, DMG BSS Parameter Change (9.4.2.125) = 152, DMG Beam Refinement (9.4.2.128) = 153, Antenna Sector ID Pattern (9.4.2.155) = 190. Once the single-octet space filled, newer elements moved into the Element ID Extension regime — Element ID 255 plus a one-octet extension index: CDMG Capabilities (9.4.2.218) = 255/17, EDMG Capabilities (9.4.2.264) = 255/61, the four MIMO control elements (9.4.2.272-275) = 255/69-72, TDD Slot Structure (9.4.2.280) = 255/77 through TDD Synchronization (9.4.2.285) = 255/82, Digital BF Feedback (9.4.2.283) = 255/80, and DMG OCB (9.4.2.310) = 255/115. The Extensible/Fragmentable columns also matter: most are Extensible (forward-compatible with appended fields) but only a few — like SSW Report and SPSH Report — are Fragmentable.
blocks.zh: Table 9-130（Element IDs）把这些元素分布在两种体制中。较早的 DMG 时代元素使用普通的单字节 Element ID：例如 DMG Wakeup Schedule（9.4.2.129）= 143、Extended Schedule（9.4.2.130）= 144、DMG Capabilities（9.4.2.126）= 148、DMG Operation（9.4.2.127）= 151、DMG BSS Parameter Change（9.4.2.125）= 152、DMG Beam Refinement（9.4.2.128）= 153、Antenna Sector ID Pattern（9.4.2.155）= 190。当单字节空间用尽后，较新的元素迁入 Element ID Extension 体制——Element ID 为 255 再加一个单字节扩展索引：CDMG Capabilities（9.4.2.218）= 255/17、EDMG Capabilities（9.4.2.264）= 255/61、四个 MIMO 控制元素（9.4.2.272-275）= 255/69-72、TDD Slot Structure（9.4.2.280）= 255/77 直到 TDD Synchronization（9.4.2.285）= 255/82、Digital BF Feedback（9.4.2.283）= 255/80、以及 DMG OCB（9.4.2.310）= 255/115。Extensible/Fragmentable 两列也很关键：大多数为 Extensible（可附加字段、向前兼容），但只有少数——如 SSW Report 与 SPSH Report——是 Fragmentable。

cites.note: Table 9-130 Element IDs — DMG-era single-octet IDs (143-153, 190): DMG Wakeup Schedule, Extended Schedule, DMG Capabilities/Operation/BSS Parameter Change, DMG Beam Refinement, Antenna Sector ID Pattern

Table 9-130 — Element ID Extension (255/17..30): CDMG Capabilities, Dynamic Bandwidth Control, CDMG Extended Schedule, SSW Report, Cluster Probe, Extended Cluster Report, Cluster Switch Announcement, Enhanced Beam Tracking, SPSH Report, Clustering Interference Assessment, CMMG Capabilities/Operation/OMN/Link Margin

Table 9-130 — Element ID Extension (255/61..115): EDMG Capabilities/Operation/Extended Schedule/Channel Measurement Feedback/Group ID Set, MIMO Setup/Poll/Feedback/Selection Control, TDD Slot Structure/Schedule/Route/Bandwidth Request/Synchronization, Digital BF Feedback, DMG Discovery Assistance, Extended Link Measurement, DMG STA Directional Transmit Activity Report, DMG OCB
